---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 📚 Documentation Issue
**Type of documentation issue** (Check one):
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Outdated documentation  
- [ ] Unclear/confusing documentation
- [ ] Documentation improvement suggestion
- [ ] Documentation error/typo
- [ ] New documentation needed

## 📍 Location
**Which documentation is affected?**
- **File(s)**: [e.g. docs/setup.md, README.md]
- **Section(s)**: [e.g. Installation, API Reference]
- **URL(s)**: [if applicable]

## 🔍 Current State
**What is the current documentation like?**
Describe the current state of the documentation or paste the relevant section.

```markdown
[Current documentation content that needs improvement]
```

## ✅ Proposed Improvement
**What should the documentation say instead?**
Describe what you think the documentation should say or how it should be improved.

```markdown
[Proposed improved documentation content]
```

## 🎯 Target Audience
**Who is this documentation for?** (Check all that apply)
- [ ] New developers/contributors
- [ ] Experienced developers
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] End users
- [ ] API consumers
- [ ] Agent developers
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 💡 Motivation
**Why is this improvement needed?**
- [ ] Current documentation is confusing
- [ ] Information is missing
- [ ] Steps don't work as described
- [ ] Examples are outdated
- [ ] Better organization needed
- [ ] Accessibility improvements
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 📋 Documentation Area
**Which area of documentation?** (Check all that apply)
- [ ] Setup/Installation (`docs/setup.md`)
- [ ] Architecture (`docs/architecture.md`)
- [ ] Agent Development (`docs/agents_catalogue/`)
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Testing (`docs/testing.md`)
- [ ] Contributing (`CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] README files
- [ ] Code comments/docstrings
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 🔧 Implementation Details
**For new documentation:**
- [ ] I can help write the documentation
- [ ] I need help with writing
- [ ] I can provide technical details
- [ ] I can review drafts

**Additional requirements:**
- [ ] Needs code examples
- [ ] Needs diagrams/screenshots
- [ ] Needs links to external resources
- [ ] Needs cross-references to other docs
- [ ] Needs translation support
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 📖 References
**Helpful resources:**
- [ ] Related documentation pages
- [ ] External documentation examples
- [ ] Code files that need documenting
- [ ] Issues or discussions about this topic
- [ ] Other resources

## 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or information about the documentation improvement.

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing documentation issues
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem or improvement
- [ ] I have specified the target audience
- [ ] I have provided specific suggestions where possible
- [ ] I have reviewed the [contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
